name: DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationResponse
title: DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationResponse
description: Configures the routing activation response message sent by the vehicle simulation on the reception of a routing activation request message.

parameters.name: valueReserved
parameters.description: The value of the reserved field in the message. ISO 13400 specifies a default value of 0x00000000.

example.code:
// Set the reserved field in the routing activation response message to 0x12345678
DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationResponse(0x12345678);
